what_would_change_our_mind: Verification of past startup achievements through credible external references.
open_items: Independent verification of Corevance's $480K ARR and customer data.
In-depth reference checks on Devin Marsh's role and achievements at DataLoom.
rationale: The mechanical check shows six contradicted claims, three of which are directly attributable to the founder involving his past ventures, triggering the integrity gate. Devin Marsh has contradicted claims regarding his role as CEO of DataLoom, a $4M seed round, and an acquisition by Cisco. These material contradictions undermine trust in all other self-reported or unverified claims, leading to a mandatory pass decision. The high-risk appetite and stage fit of the fund do not override the integrity gate. A re-evaluation can occur only after independent verification of Devin Marsh's past achievements.
